sexp: (AVG () (JOIN (M000219) (VALUE 84837NED (MSR (M000219)) (DIM Woningkenmerken (1014800)) (DIM WijkenEnBuurten (BU03550303 BU00860502 WK197812))) (VALUE 83187NED (MSR (M000219)) (DIM Woningkenmerken (1014800)) (DIM WijkenEnBuurten (BU19240400)))))
sql:
SELECT
  Measure,
  AVG(Value) AS AVG
FROM (
  SELECT
    *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM (
      SELECT
        Measure,
        Value,
        WijkenEnBuurten,
        Woningkenmerken
      FROM "data/nl/odata3/84837NED.parquet"
      UNPIVOT(Value FOR Measure IN ('M000219'))
      WHERE
        Measure IN ('M000219')
    )
    PIVOT(MAX(Value) FOR 
      WijkenEnBuurten IN ('BU03550303', 'BU00860502', 'WK197812')
      Woningkenmerken IN ('1014800')
    )
  ) AS TableA
  FULL JOIN (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM (
      SELECT
        Measure,
        Value,
        Woningkenmerken,
        WijkenEnBuurten
      FROM "data/nl/odata3/83187NED.parquet"
      UNPIVOT(Value FOR Measure IN ('M000219'))
      WHERE
        Measure IN ('M000219')
    )
    PIVOT(MAX(Value) FOR Woningkenmerken IN ('1014800') WijkenEnBuurten IN ('BU19240400'))
  ) AS TableB
    ON TableA.Measure = TableB.Measure
)
UNPIVOT(Value FOR name IN (COLUMNS(c -> NOT CONTAINS(c, 'Measure'))))
GROUP BY
  Measure

sql:
SELECT
  CONCAT_WS(', ', Measure, WijkenEnBuurten) AS Dimension_Measure,
  SUM(Value) AS "SUM['Woningkenmerken']",
  SUM(CASE WHEN Woningkenmerken IN ('ZW25806') THEN Value ELSE 0 END) AS "ZW25806",
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN Woningkenmerken IN ('ZW25806') THEN Value ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(Value),
    2
  ) AS "%"
FROM (
  SELECT
    Measure,
    Value,
    WijkenEnBuurten,
    Woningkenmerken
  FROM "data/nl/odata3/83187NED.parquet"
  UNPIVOT(Value FOR Measure IN (M000221))
)
WHERE
  WijkenEnBuurten IN ('WK074805')
GROUP BY
  Dimension_Measure
